# GitHub Readiness Planning

This planning note is not an executable GitHub Actions workflow.

## Purpose

Prepare future repository governance concepts for communication infrastructure without enabling deployment, runtime communication, or provider implementation.

## Future Concepts For Review

- Branch protection planning
- Required reviewer planning
- Required build, lint, and TypeScript checks
- Scoped communication safety scan planning
- Forbidden import scan planning
- Execution leakage scan planning
- Provider contamination scan planning
- No-deployment workflow planning

## Non-Execution Statement

No `.github/workflows` file is created by Phase 4.0. No deployment automation, provider credentials, runtime communication, or workflow execution is enabled.
